summary: Crystal‑clear front‑of‑house audience tape captures a sunny, high‑energy set with standout Here Comes Sunshine and an uplifting second half.
review: The recording offers a remarkably crisp, in‑your‑face audience sound that makes you feel right on the floor, while the performance radiates sunshine‑filled energy—from a bright opening of “Here Comes Sunshine” through a rousing closer “I Fought the Law.”  Reviewers note an especially strong second set that lifts the show beyond its occasional first‑set dips.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are uniformly enthusiastic about both performance and sound; weighted average of strong show (≈4) and excellent recording (≈4.5) yields a 4.2 rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: FOB‑style audience capture that is crisp, clear and highly immersive; no reported muddiness or dropouts.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: A bright, high‑energy first set with a few average moments gives way to a tighter, more uplifting second set that leaves the audience buzzing.
